checks.description: Validate Johnson‑counter wrap‑around without assuming a fixed latency.
notes: The check only requires that the counter eventually returns to zero after reset, not that it does so at a specific cycle count.
checks.pass_condition: After reset release, the value 0 must be observed on Q at some later time; no exact‑cycle requirement is imposed.
checks.trigger_condition: When reset has been released and observation of Q begins.

checks.pass_condition: Q must change at least once within a conservative observation window after reset release, following the Johnson‑counter rule (shift right with appropriate MSB). Exact cycle timing is not required.
checks.trigger_condition: When the plan applies the basic counter operation after reset.
